title: German Beef Casserole
description: A hearty, comforting German-inspired casserole filled with tender beef and creamy sauce, perfect for a cold evening.
instructions: Cook the ground beef in a large skillet over medium-high heat, breaking it up into small pieces, until browned, about 5-7 minutes.
Add the chopped onion and minced garlic to the skillet and cook until the onion is translucent, about 3-4 minutes.
Sprinkle the flour over the beef and onion mixture and cook for 1-2 minutes, stirring constantly.
Gradually add the milk, whisking continuously, and bring the mixture to a simmer.
Reduce the heat to medium-low and let the sauce simmer for 2-3 minutes or until it thickens.
Stir in the creamy cooking cream and diced tomatoes.
Season the sauce with salt and black pepper to taste.
Transfer the beef and sauce mixture to a 9x13 inch baking dish.
Top the casserole with chopped fresh parsley.
Bake in the preheated oven for 20-25 minutes or until the casserole is hot and the top is lightly browned.
